alphaCategories.name: Live Chart Data Advantage
alphaCategories.description: Apple RSS and Google Play chart rankings update continuously. Free LLMs have no access — any rank-based query is automatic high differentiation.

alphaCategories.name: Computed Momentum Signal
alphaCategories.description: growth_signal (breakout/strong/moderate/stable/declining) is derived from rank delta + rating velocity. Does not exist in any raw App Store or Play Store API response.

alphaCategories.name: Cross-Platform Unified Schema
alphaCategories.description: Same fields, same signal logic, same confidence tiers across iOS and Android. No public tool normalizes both stores into a single typed schema.

alphaCategories.name: Android Install Band Ground Truth
alphaCategories.description: Google's own install band labels pulled directly from Play Store pages — not modelled estimates. Free LLMs fabricate or cite years-old install counts.

alphaCategories.name: Category Median Benchmarking
alphaCategories.description: Each result includes category_median_rating_velocity and relative_momentum, requiring a live corpus of category peers no free LLM has.

crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: Get AppSignal breakout apps in a category, cross-reference with funding data to find unfunded breakout apps — acquisition targets or whitespace opportunities.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Which productivity apps are showing breakout signal on iOS but have raised less than $5M in funding?

crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: Correlate AppSignal momentum with recent press — breakout with no press = organic growth, breakout with press = PR-driven spike.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Are the current iOS health app breakouts driven by press coverage or organic growth?

upstreamGaps.gap: SensorTower costs $25K/year with no agent-callable API. App Store Connect and Play Console are developer-only. No public API exists for competitive cross-platform momentum at query time.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: Per-query pricing at $0.10/response with a typed MCP schema — the only competitive app intelligence tool callable by an AI agent without an enterprise contract.

upstreamGaps.gap: Apple RSS gives chart position but no ratings. iTunes API gives ratings but no chart rank. No single official source combines both.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: Merges iTunes API + Apple RSS into one response with derived velocity and signal classification.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Which meditation apps are gaining momentum on both iOS and Android right now?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLMs cite Calm/Headspace from stale training data with no momentum signal

candidatePromptPool.prompt: What are the breakout apps in iOS productivity right now?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: breakout classification requires live rank delta + velocity — impossible without live data

candidatePromptPool.prompt: How does Spotify rank and trend on Android compared to other music apps in its category?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Free LLMs give 2023 rating counts, no rank delta, no category median

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Show me the top 10 finance apps on iOS with their growth signals and category momentum.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Category median velocity requires a live corpus — free LLMs cannot compute relative_momentum

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Which Android health apps have 100M+ installs and strong or better growth signal?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Install counts are fabricated or years old in free LLMs; no growth signal possible

candidatePromptPool.prompt: I'm building a budget tracker app. Who are my top iOS competitors and are any of them declining?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Competitor list is stale; declining signal requires live data

candidatePromptPool.prompt: What AI assistant apps are breaking out on Android right now and how do they compare to iOS?

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: AI app landscape changes weekly; free LLM data is months old

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Look up com.netflix.mediaclient on Android — install scale, growth signal, category comparison.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Netflix install band from free LLMs is a guess; no category comparison possible
